title: CVE-2026-45247: Magento RCE Flaw
summary: [P1] CISA added a critical flaw impacting Mirasvit Cache Warmer, a popular Magento full-page cache extension, to its KEV catalog. No patch is currently available, and exploitation in the wild has been reported. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: Remote code execution vulnerability in a public-facing application
